title: Vedapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Vedapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vedapureeswarar temple is a sacred place in Thiruvadhipuram, on the northern banks of the Cheyyar River.
overview.description: Vedapureeswarar temple is a sacred place in Thiruvadhipuram, on the northern banks of the Cheyyar River. It is in the Tiruvannamalai District near Kanchipuram in the state of Tamil Nadu in South India. This sacred place is now known as Cheyyar but was previously called Thiruvothur. This is one of the important towns in Thiruvanamalai district.

topPlaces.name: Avalurpet
topPlaces.description: Avalurpet is a developed village town panchayat in melmalayanur taluk of Viluppuram district. It has a population of 13,171 and acts as a junction for Thiruvannamalai and Melmalayanur temple and kelpennathur and chetpat.

topPlaces.name: Pennathur
topPlaces.description: Pennathur is a panchayat town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Valathi
topPlaces.description: Valathi, also known as Valathy, is a village in Gingee assembly constituency, Villupuram district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is nearly 50 km from district capital Villupuram, 40 km from Tiruvannamalai and 15 km from Gingee.

topPlaces.name: Kil Sevalambady
topPlaces.description: Kil Sevalambady is a village located in Viluppuram District Melmalaiyanur Taluk, Peruvalur Post, State Tamil Nadu, India. Placed in rural part of Viluppuram district in Tamil Nadu, it is one of the 79 villages in Melmalayanur Panchayat Union, Vadavetti Panchayat in Viluppuram district.

topPlaces.name: Melmalayanur
topPlaces.description: Melmalayanur is a developing town in Villupuram district Tamil Nadu, India, 10 km from Avalurpet and 21km away from Gingee (Villupuram District) It is famous for the Goddess Angala Amman temple . Devotees across South India visit this temple to avail blessings of lord Angala Amman .

topPlaces.name: Moongilthuraipattu
topPlaces.description: Moongilthuraipattu is a village panchayat in Sankarapuram taluk of kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu. It is on the banks of Thenpennai (South Pennar River) river.

topPlaces.name: Chetpet
topPlaces.description: Chetpet is a major town panchayat in Tiruvannamalai district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Chetpet's major economical activity is processing paddy and the town is home to one of the largest organised paddy exchange markets of the state.

topPlaces.name: Devikapuram
topPlaces.description: Devikapuram, also called Devikeezpuram, is a town and a Panchayat board in Tiruvannamalai district, located in Tamil Nadu, India, 45 kilometres from the city of Tiruvannamalai, also the district headquarters.

items.note: Avalurpet is a developed village town panchayat in melmalayanur taluk of Viluppuram district. It has a population of 13,171 and acts as a junction for Thiruvannamalai and Melmalayanur temple and kelpennathur and chetpat.
Pennathur is a panchayat town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Valathi, also known as Valathy, is a village in Gingee assembly constituency, Villupuram district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is nearly 50 km from district capital Villupuram, 40 km from Tiruvannamalai and 15 km from Gingee.

Kil Sevalambady is a village located in Viluppuram District Melmalaiyanur Taluk, Peruvalur Post, State Tamil Nadu, India. Placed in rural part of Viluppuram district in Tamil Nadu, it is one of the 79 villages in Melmalayanur Panchayat Union, Vadavetti Panchayat in Viluppuram district.

Melmalayanur is a developing town in Villupuram district Tamil Nadu, India, 10 km from Avalurpet and 21km away from Gingee (Villupuram District) It is famous for the Goddess Angala Amman temple . Devotees across South India visit this temple to avail blessings of lord Angala Amman .
Moongilthuraipattu is a village panchayat in Sankarapuram taluk of kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu. It is on the banks of Thenpennai (South Pennar River) river.

Chetpet is a major town panchayat in Tiruvannamalai district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Chetpet's major economical activity is processing paddy and the town is home to one of the largest organised paddy exchange markets of the state.

Devikapuram, also called Devikeezpuram, is a town and a Panchayat board in Tiruvannamalai district, located in Tamil Nadu, India, 45 kilometres from the city of Tiruvannamalai, also the district headquarters.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vedapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (129 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vedapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vedapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avalurpet, Pennathur, Valathi, Kil Sevalambady, Melmalayanur.
